top_signals.title: Oil Rises After Three-Day Drop With Iran-US Talks in Focus
top_signals.summary: Oil rose after three days of declines, as statements by Iran on uranium and the Strait of Hormuz pared earlier optimism over progress in the negotiations with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: This shocking West End play is like Netflix’s Adolescence but live
top_signals.summary: Equus play review and star rating: ★★★★ If a psychological drama about a teenager with an erotic fixation on horses sounds controversial, imagine how the idea landed 53 years ago. Peter Shaffer’s Equus is still platforming taboo-breaking conversations around mental health 53 years after its world premiere, which is probably more a criticism of our [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
